{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Toad Mallet
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=Unlocked after ringing the Sky City bell in Parsia.
|description=Blessed by Earth’s Will, the first transmigrated toad ascended into a Golden Toad, mastering the Truth of Capital— one of the Three Thousand Great Principles! This mallet, its soul-bound artifact, grants dominion over the path of wealth.
|fame=17
|art=20
|fth=28
|civ=12
|tech=13
|ss1=Parsian Exploration, DMG to Enemies +1% <br> Parsian Exploration, Black Tadpoles +1%
|ss2= Parsian Exploration, DMG to Enemies +2% <br> Parsian Exploration, Black Tadpoles +2%
|ss3= Parsian Exploration, DMG to Enemies +3% <br> Parsian Exploration, Black Tadpoles +3%
}}

[[Category:green Relics]]
[[Category:green FTH Relics]]
